creator: drcone.com

evidence.text: Traditional organizational learning frequently emphasizes information transfer, procedural compliance, or isolated skill acquisition. In contrast, adaptive organizational learning prioritizes reflective development, contextual understanding, critical thinking, adaptive reasoning, and transformational growth.[4] Learning becomes developmental rather than transactional.
